ab: ku talragili sya Sula, miyalri ka lalake ki Ngudradrekai.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Sula，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Sula, and he is also an Rukai child.

ab: taelrenai ikai ki cekelenai Labuwa kibulrubulru.
ch: 我們一起在大武部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Labuwa tribe.

ab: tataelreanenai kilalalra ki mahudrange lu tumaulai, taha malrigilinai Ngudradreadrekadha.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說魯凱語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Rukai proficiently.

ab: maelrengaku si kabitulru, kau Sula edreka si kahilai.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Sula很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Sula is short and thin.

ab: kau Sula pahahakaca, madalame makanaelre iniya.
ch: Sula很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Sula is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
